content.text: 请根据截图分析页面内容和状态，选择操作路径：XML方式：用 get_screen_xml 获取节点，点击用坐标调 click，输入用 innerid 调 input_text；视觉方式：用 ai_click(text/icon) 点击，用 ai_set_text 输入，用 ai_seq_click 批量点击。不要根据截图自行估算坐标。

content.text:
The device is stuck on the keyguard/lockscreen and I am unable to dismiss it with the available tools — swipes, clicks, home, and lock_screen toggle have not transitioned the foreground package away from `com.android.systemui`. I cannot proceed to open VLC and create a playlist.

{"success": false, "confidence": 0.95, "evidence_summary": "Device remained on system keyguard (com.android.systemui) throughout the session — AOD-style dim screen with the keyguard_root_view present in the XML. Multiple unlock swipes from various positions, taps, home, and lock_screen toggles did not dismiss the keyguard, so VLC could not be brought to the foreground.", "screenshot_paths": ["last_screenshot was the AOD/keyguard dark screen returned by mcp__wimb-device__get_screenshot"], "failure_reason": "Unable to bypass the device keyguard/lockscreen via available MCP gestures; foreground package never left com.android.systemui, so VLC could not be opened to create the 'My Videos' playlist."}

result:
The device is stuck on the keyguard/lockscreen and I am unable to dismiss it with the available tools — swipes, clicks, home, and lock_screen toggle have not transitioned the foreground package away from `com.android.systemui`. I cannot proceed to open VLC and create a playlist.

{"success": false, "confidence": 0.95, "evidence_summary": "Device remained on system keyguard (com.android.systemui) throughout the session — AOD-style dim screen with the keyguard_root_view present in the XML. Multiple unlock swipes from various positions, taps, home, and lock_screen toggles did not dismiss the keyguard, so VLC could not be brought to the foreground.", "screenshot_paths": ["last_screenshot was the AOD/keyguard dark screen returned by mcp__wimb-device__get_screenshot"], "failure_reason": "Unable to bypass the device keyguard/lockscreen via available MCP gestures; foreground package never left com.android.systemui, so VLC could not be opened to create the 'My Videos' playlist."}
